articles.title: Litton fights for Bangladesh after Abbas and Shahzad run through middle order
articles.description: Bangladesh were 116 for 6 not long into the post-lunch session on the opening day before fighting back to get to tea at 168 for 6

articles.title: Pakistan lose eight WTC points for slow over rate in first Test against Bangladesh
articles.description: Pakistan were eight overs short of the target and are now placed eighth on the WTC table with 11.11% points

articles.title: ICC suspends funding to Cricket Canada over governance-related issues
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo understands the funding suspension will not impact any cricket activities, including high performance programmes

articles.title: Fatima Sana smashes fastest fifty in women's T20Is
articles.description: Her 15-ball effort broke the record previous held by Sophie Devine, Phoebe Litchfield and Richa Ghosh, off 18 balls

articles.title: ICC meetings set to revisit WTC format structure, one-Test series proposals
articles.description: One of the recommendations is to bring Zimbabwe, Ireland and Afghanistan into the WTC

articles.title: 'They don't need my service any longer' - Mushfiqur Rahim rules out ODI comeback
articles.description: He confirmed that he was asked to come back after announcing his retirement from the format last year following the team's early exit from the Champions Trophy

articles.title: Saudi Arabia set to launch Dunes League T20 in October
articles.description: It will be Saudi Arabia's first franchise league, and is expected to feature retired 'legends' who are still active in the franchise circuit

articles.title: Andrew Flintoff set to be named new Sydney Thunder BBL coach
articles.description: Former England allrounder is set for his first franchise coaching role overseas after two seasons in the Hundred with Northern Superchargers outside of his current England Lions role

articles.title: Sarah Taylor appointed England Men's Test fielding coach for New Zealand series
articles.description: Taylor set to become first female coach to work with senior England men's team

articles.title: Nahid Rana rips through Pakistan to seal a final-session win for Bangladesh
articles.description: This is now Bangladesh's third consecutive win against Pakistan, after they won the 2024 series by 2-0 margin

articles.title: Bangladesh government asks committee to look into 2026 T20 World Cup fiasco
articles.description: The three-man committee will look into all aspects of the decision that led to Bangladesh being removed from the tournament by the ICC

articles.title: R Ashwin backs Devdutt Padikkal for Test no. 3 slot
articles.description: The southpaw has gone through the 2026 IPL season in a rich vein of form, scoring 367 runs at a strike rate of 172.30.

articles.title: Simon Helmot replaces Jonathan Trott as Gulf Giants' head coach in ILT20
articles.description: Gulf Giants have appointed Australian Simon Helmot as their new head coach ahead of this year's ILT20. He replaces legendary former England batter Jonathan Trott, who was in the role for one season.
